stemHtml: Regarding call sign suffixes "heavy" and "super", which statement is correct?

options.a: "Super" is used as a suffix for A340 or A380.
options.b: "Super" is used as a prefix for A380 only.
options.c: "Heavy" is used as a prefix for the call sign.
options.d: "Heavy" is a suffix for aircraft in wake turbulence category HEAVY.
